## Confections.FillingOptionId type

Union type for filling option IDs. Can be either a RecipeId or IngredientId - disambiguation happens via the type discriminator.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type FillingOptionId = RecipeId | IngredientId;
```
**References:** [RecipeId](./ts-chocolate.recipeid.md)<!-- -->, [IngredientId](./ts-chocolate.ingredientid.md)
